config.title: #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
dim g_pM60224 : set g_pM60224 = nothing
function fopen() : fopen = true set g_pM60224 = doc_.getmodule(60224) end function
dim g_nPortSpeed dim g_strRegKey
function setup( byval pageTitle , byval strRegKey) page_.topelement.title = pageTitle g_strRegKey = strRegKey if g_strRegKey = "HKLM_KOLEKTOR_SETTINGS" then page_.ctrl(ID_KOLEKTOR).hide=false else page_.ctrl(ID_KOLEKTOR).hide=true end if init end function
function save_settings get_settings().to_registry g_strRegKey end function
function read_settings dim pCommSettings : set pCommSettings = g_pM60224.new_comm_settings() pCommSettings.from_registry g_strRegKey set read_settings = pCommSettings end function
function init
' ustawienia domyślne ' bit 1 : port (1 ... 4) ' bit 2 : parzystość : ' - 1 - brak ' - 2 - nieparzyste ' - 3 - parzyste ' - 4 - znak ' - 5 - spacja ' bit 3 : bity w bajcie (7,8,9) ' bit 4 : bit stopu ' - 1 - 1 ' - 2 - 1,5 ' - 3 - 2 ' bit 5 : predkosc (wyliczana) ' - 01- 110 ' - 02- 300 ' - 03- 600 ' - 04- 1200 ' - 05- 2400 ' - 06- 4800 ' - 07- 9600 (Default) ' - 08- 14400 ' - 09- 19200 ' - 10- 28800 ' - 11- 38400 ' - 12- 56000 ' - 13- 57600 ' - 14- 115200 ' - 15- 128000 ' - 16- 256000 ' - 17- inna 'bit 6 : model kolektora ' - 1- CipherLab ' - 2- Unitech set_settings(read_settings())
end function '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function radio2speed(byval eSpeed) select case eSpeed case 1 radio2speed = 110 case 2 radio2speed = 300 case 3 radio2speed = 600 case 4 radio2speed = 1200 case 5 radio2speed = 2400 case 6 radio2speed = 4800 case 7 radio2speed = 9600 case 8 radio2speed = 14400 case 9 radio2speed = 19200 case 10 radio2speed = 28800 case 11 radio2speed = 38400 case 12 radio2speed = 56000 case 13 radio2speed = 57600 case 14 radio2speed = 115200 case 15 radio2speed = 128000 case 16 radio2speed = 256000 case 17 radio2speed = g_nPortSpeed end select
end function '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'ustawienie odpowiedniego stanu kontrolek function set_settings(byref pCommSettings)
page_.ctrl(20).value = clng(mid(pCommSettings.m_strPort,4,1)) page_.ctrl(21).value = clng(pCommSettings.m_nParity) + 1 page_.ctrl(22).value = clng(pCommSettings.m_nDataBits - 6) page_.ctrl(23).value = clng(pCommSettings.m_nStopBits) + 1 'model kolektora if pCommSettings.m_strModel = "CipherLab" then page_.ctrl(24).value = clng(1) else page_.ctrl(24).value = clng(2) end if 'metoda brutalnej siły :( page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SPEED).value = clng(17) g_nPortSpeed = clng(pCommSettings.m_nSpeed)
dim iter for iter = 1 to 16 if radio2speed(iter) = pCommSettings.m_nSpeed then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SPEED).value = clng(iter) exit for end if next page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED).hide = (page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SPEED).value <> 17)
end function
function get_settings dim pCommSettings : set pCommSettings = g_pM60224.new_comm_settings() pCommSettings.m_strPort = "COM" + cstr(page_.ctrl(20).value) pCommSettings.m_nParity = clng(page_.ctrl(21).value) - 1 pCommSettings.m_nDataBits = clng(page_.ctrl(22).value + 6) pCommSettings.m_nStopBits = clng(page_.ctrl(23).value) - 1 pCommSettings.m_nSpeed = g_nPortSpeed pCommSettings.m_strModel = cstr(page_.ctrl(24).value) set get_settings = pCommSettings end function
function fok save_settings page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
function c##CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value= clng(g_nPortSpeed) end function
function c##CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED##_ondataentered=false g_nPortSpeed=CLng(newValue) end function
function c##CTRLID_SPEED##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_SPEED##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_SPEED##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRLID_SPEED##_ondataentered=false if newValue <> 17 then g_nPortSpeed = radio2speed(newValue) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED).value = clng(g_nPortSpeed) end if page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CUSTOM_SPEED).hide = (newValue <> 17)
c##CTRLID_SPEED##_ondataentered=true end function

page.body:
Model kolektora
CipherLab Unitech
Port komunikacyjny
COM 1 COM 2 COM 3 COM 4
Parzystość
brak nieparzyste parzyste znak spacja
Ilość bitów danych
7 8 9
Bit stopu
1 1,5 2
Prędkość
110 300 600 1200 2400 4800 9600 14400 19200 28800 38400 56000 57600 115200 128000 256000
inna
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
